subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi, My Name! May thou, God willing, be ever engaged in the remembrance of the True One and in His service. I ask and beseech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: م ه دی اسمی انشاء الله همیشه بذکر حق و خدمتش مشغول باشید قلت اسئله و ارجو
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
